typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{PROJECT NO.} as string,
		{PROJECT ID} as string,
		{PROJECT NAME} as string,
		{CLIENT NAME} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{DOC ID} as string,
		{TYPE CLASS} as string,
		{DOC. TYPE} as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{ALTERNATE DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		TITLE as string,
		{REVISION NO.} as string,
		{REVISION DATE} as string,
		{ISSUE STATE} as string,
		{OFFICE LOCATION} as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT as string,
		{TOTAL CURRENT PROGRESS} as string,
		EWP as string,
		CWA as string,
		CWP as string,
		HOLD as string,
		{TAG_EQUIPMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{COST CODE} as string,
		APPROVER as string,
		CHECKER as string,
		{REASON FOR CHANGE-ENGINEERING} as string,
		ISO_LINU as string,
		ISO_NAME as string,
		{SUPERSEDED BY} as string,
		START_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IDC_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFI_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFR_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFA_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		ICA_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFB_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		TBE_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFP_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		AFD_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		AFC_FINAL_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_01_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_03_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_04_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_05_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_06_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		{CONTRACT NO.} as string,
		{DELIVERABLE TYPE} as string,
		{IDOCS FOLDER} as string,
		{IDOCS URL} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/iDocs/Doc_Master_Eng/Latest_iDocs_doc_eng.csv']) ~> srcDocEngRaw
srcDocEngRaw derive(WORK_PACKAGE = iif(length(trim(regexExtract(CWP,`(\d+-[a-zA-Z]{2}\d+)`,1)))>0,regexExtract(CWP,`(\d+-[a-zA-Z]{2}\d+)`,1),'null')) ~> DataTransform
DataTransform sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_idoc_doc_eng_id as integer,
		PROJECT_NAME as string,
		PROJECT_NUMBER as string,
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		CLIENT_NAME as string,
		DOC_ID as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		TYPE_CLASS as string,
		DOCUMENT_TYPE as string,
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER as string,
		ALTERNATE_DOC_NUMBER as string,
		Title as string,
		Issue_State as string,
		Revision as string,
		Revision_Date as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT as string,
		OFFICE_LOCATION as string,
		TOTAL_CURRENT_PROGRESS as string,
		EWP as string,
		CWA as string,
		CWP as string,
		HOLDS as string,
		TAG_EQUIPMENT_NUMBER as string,
		WORK_PACKAGE as string,
		cost_code as string,
		approver as string,
		checker as string,
		Reason_for_change as string,
		ISO_LINU as string,
		ISO_NAME as string,
		SUPERSEDED_BY as string,
		START_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IDC_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFI_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFR_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFA_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		ICA_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFB_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		TBE_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		IFP_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		AFD_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		AFC_FINAL_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_01_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_03_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_04_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_05_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_06_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		CONTRACT_NO as string,
		DELIVERABLE_TYPE as string,
		IDOCS_FOLDER as string,
		IDOCS_URL as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		PROJECT_NAME = {PROJECT NAME},
		PROJECT_NUMBER = {PROJECT NO.},
		PROJECT_ID = {PROJECT ID},
		CLIENT_NAME = {CLIENT NAME},
		DOC_ID = {DOC ID},
		DELIVERABLE,
		TYPE_CLASS = {TYPE CLASS},
		DOCUMENT_TYPE = {DOC. TYPE},
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER = {DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		ALTERNATE_DOC_NUMBER = {ALTERNATE DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		Title = TITLE,
		Issue_State = {ISSUE STATE},
		Revision = {REVISION NO.},
		Revision_Date = {REVISION DATE},
		DISCIPLINE,
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT,
		OFFICE_LOCATION = {OFFICE LOCATION},
		TOTAL_CURRENT_PROGRESS = {TOTAL CURRENT PROGRESS},
		EWP,
		CWA,
		CWP,
		HOLDS = HOLD,
		TAG_EQUIPMENT_NUMBER = {TAG_EQUIPMENT NUMBER},
		WORK_PACKAGE,
		cost_code = {COST CODE},
		approver = APPROVER,
		checker = CHECKER,
		Reason_for_change = {REASON FOR CHANGE-ENGINEERING},
		ISO_LINU,
		ISO_NAME,
		SUPERSEDED_BY = {SUPERSEDED BY},
		START_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IDC_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IFI_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IFR_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IFA_ACTIVITY_ID,
		ICA_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IFB_ACTIVITY_ID,
		TBE_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IFP_ACTIVITY_ID,
		AFD_ACTIVITY_ID,
		AFC_FINAL_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_01_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_03_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_04_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_05_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_06_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09_ACTIVITY_ID,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10_ACTIVITY_ID,
		IDOCS_FOLDER = {IDOCS FOLDER},
		IDOCS_URL = {IDOCS URL},
		CONTRACT_NO = {CONTRACT NO.},
		DELIVERABLE_TYPE = {DELIVERABLE TYPE}
	)) ~> snkDocEngSynapse
